items.title: Introduction to Probability (Blitzstein & Hwang)
items.author: Joseph K. Blitzstein, Jessica Hwang
items.note: Clear undergraduate treatment of random variables, PMFs, PDFs and CDFs with intuitive examples.

items.title: SciPy stats module documentation
items.author: SciPy Developers
items.note: Practical reference for pmf, pdf, cdf and ppf methods on named distributions in Python.

items.title: All of Statistics (Wasserman)
items.author: Larry Wasserman
items.note: Concise coverage of random variables and distribution functions with connections to statistical inference and ML.
